# Issues List

## Template Issues

-   Fix headers and footers
-   Change fonts:
    -   body
    -   headers
-   Can't figure out how to include an abstract

## Quarto / RStudio Issues and Requests

-   Q: Why is index.qmd required for book?
-   FR: allow project `execute-dir` option to specify a path like `output-dir`
-   When editing a list in amarkdown file (either `.md` or `.qmd`), if I switch from source to visual mode and back, all indents become 4 spaces and all text is separated from the hyphens by 3 spaces.
    -   This switch also blew away a markdown formatted link.

**Before:**

``` markdown
- Fix headers and footers
- Change fonts:
  - body
  - headers
```

**After:**

``` markdown
-   Fix headers and footers
-   Change fonts:
    -   body
    -   headers
```

## Archive

-   REPORTED to plugin author: Contrary to the advice given in the titlepage v1 documentation, the class option `onepage` did not prevent alternating margins on even/odd pages. Using `twoside=false` does correct this, per <https://tex.stackexchange.com/a/18791/286622>.
-   REPORTED to plugin author: Missing characters in equations on page 4, section 2.1
    -   ellipsis ($\ldots$), mu ($\mu$), sigma ($\sigma$), infinity ($\infty$), summation ($\Sigma$), square root ($\sqrt{}$), minus ($-$), and script N ($\mathcal{N}$)
    - FIXED: comment out `include-in-header: in-header.tex`
